name: Belgian Dutch (Flemish)
notes: Flemish / Belgian Dutch (Vlaams). Alveolar /r/ [r] in most varieties (vs. NL uvular [ʀ]). /ɣ/ (voiced velar fricative) more robust than in NL Dutch. Considered more conservative than Netherlands Dutch in some features. Strong dialect continuum from West-Flemish to Limburgish. Source: König & van der Auwera (1994).

sources.author: Gussenhoven, C.
sources.title: Dutch
sources.notes: In: Handbook of the International Phonetic Association
